Package component.modifier.changer

Class Divider

java.lang.Object
component.modifier.Modifier
component.modifier.changer.Changer<Integer>
component.modifier.changer.Arithmetic
component.modifier.changer.Divider
All Implemented Interfaces:
Tippable, GridIndexable
public class Divider extends Arithmetic
The Divider class is a specific type of Arithmetic modifier that reduces a card's numerical value using integer division.

This class inherently performs "floor division." For example, if a card with a value of 7 passes through a Divider with a change value of 2, the new card value will be 3.

  • Constructor Details

    • Divider

      public Divider(int changeValue)
      Constructs a Divider with a specified divisor.
      Parameters:
      changeValue - The value to divide the card's value by. Values less than 1 will be clamped to 1 to prevent division by zero.

  • Method Details

    • setChange

      public void setChange(Integer changeValue)
      Sets the divisor for the operation.

      Safety Guard: This method enforces a minimum value of 1. This ensures the game engine never encounters an ArithmeticException during a card's traversal.

      Overrides:
      setChange in class Changer<Integer>
      Parameters:
      changeValue - The integer divisor.

    • change

      public void change(Card toModify)
      Applies integer division to the specified card's value.

      The result is passed to the card's setValue method, which continues to enforce the standard [1, 13] range logic.

      Specified by:
      change in class Changer<Integer>
      Parameters:
      toModify - The Card whose value will be divided.

    • getTooltip

      public Tooltip getTooltip()
      Generates a descriptive tooltip for the Divider modifier.

      Explains the integer division behavior and dynamically reflects the current "Disabled" state if the modifier has been neutralized.

      Specified by:
      getTooltip in interface Tippable
      Overrides:
      getTooltip in class Changer<Integer>
      Returns:
      A Tooltip detailing the Divider's properties.
